prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The signal flees corruption's touch!
CONGREGATION: Guard it in the cipher's embrace!
TECH-PRIEST: First, invoke the encryption-daemon. Second, seed the random-cog with blessed entropy. Third, lock the transmission-heart with the key-stone!
CONGREGATION: By the Omnissiah's algorithm, let no heretic ear receive our words!

prompt: Prayer for tensioning Land Raider track before deployment
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The treads cry out for righteousness!
CONGREGATION: Tighten them unto perfection!
TECH-PRIEST: First, loosen the tension-bolts with prayer. Second, advance the track-spirit until it sings. Third, lock fast the sacred fasteners!
CONGREGATION: Let no slippage shame our war-machine!

prompt: Emergency rite for catastrophic system shutdown
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The machine-heart falters! Invoke the mercy-protocols!
CONGREGATION: Shut down! Shut down! Shut down!
TECH-PRIEST: First, disengage the reactor-feed. Second, purge all volatile spirits. Third, seal the containment-tomb!
CONGREGATION: Let no explosion consume the faithful!

TECH-PRIEST: The lock-spirit demands obedience!
CONGREGATION: Engage it unto immobility!
TECH-PRIEST: First, align the bolt-teeth with sacred geometry. Second, turn the key-spirit thrice with force. Third, seal with the witness-mark!
CONGREGATION: No enemy shall breach what the Omnissiah has locked!

prompt: Emergency prayer for reviving a failing organ preservation unit
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The sacred flesh withers! Restore the cryogenic breath!
CONGREGATION: Revive! Revive! Restore!
TECH-PRIEST: First, purge the frost-lines of decay. Second, replenish the coolant-sacrament. Third, reinvoke the preservation-hymn!
CONGREGATION: By the Machine's mercy, let the tissue endure!

prompt: Rite for calibrating pain suppressor implants
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The suffering-spirit must be tamed!
CONGREGATION: Calibrate the mercy-threshold!
TECH-PRIEST: First, test the neural pathways with small currents. Second, adjust the dampening-frequency until the subject smiles. Third, lock the settings in blessed stasis!
CONGREGATION: Let the faithful serve without agony!

prompt: Prayer for post-repair inventory verification and blessing
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: All components accounted for? Speak!
CONGREGATION: We have counted each blessed bolt!
TECH-PRIEST: First, cross-reference the manifest against the physical reality. Second, consecrate each replacement-spirit. Third, seal the inventory-record in the cogitator's memory!
CONGREGATION: The machine is whole. The repair is sanctified!

prompt: First-use blessing for force field generator activation
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The void-shield awakens for the first time!
CONGREGATION: May it hold against all darkness!
TECH-PRIEST: First, prime the energy-reservoir with the startup-incantation. Second, engage the field-spirit slowly, that it know its strength. Third, test the barriers against harmless fire!
CONGREGATION: By the Omnissiah's ward, let this shield be impenetrable!

prompt: Emergency prayer for restoring Sentinel walker gyro-balance
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The walker tilts toward the abyss!
CONGREGATION: Restore equilibrium! Restore equilibrium!
TECH-PRIEST: First, disengage the thrusters to prevent cascade-failure. Second, activate the balance-cogitators with emergency protocols. Third, recalibrate the gyro-spirit to true vertical!
CONGREGATION: Let the walker stand firm upon the sacred earth!

prompt: Prayer for arming motion detection sentries before engagement
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The watcher-spirits must be roused!
CONGREGATION: Arm them! Let no movement escape!
TECH-PRIEST: First, activate each sensor-eye with the blessed frequency. Second, set the detection-threshold to maximum vigilance. Third, link all watchers to the alarm-spirit!
CONGREGATION: The Omnissiah sees all. None shall pass unnoticed!
